description: This video explains how to interpret the RSI (Relative Strength Index) as a momentum indicator, highlighting its significance in identifying market trends and potential reversals.
topic_summary: The RSI indicates momentum changes in price. An RSI above 70 suggests overbought conditions, while below 30 indicates oversold conditions. Increasing momentum with rising prices signals a strong uptrend, whereas decreasing momentum may suggest a market shift. [t=0:48] [t=20:40]
